title: Incorrect query result in a 3-way join due to affinity issues
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(textid VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE i(intid INT PRIMARY KEY CHECK(intid > 0));
SELECT t1.textid AS a, i.intid AS b, t2.textid AS c FROM t t1 JOIN i ON t1.textid = CAST(i.intid AS CHAR) JOIN t t2 ON t1.textid = t2.textid;
key_bug_features: Incorrect result in 3-way join due to affinity issues
